description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright and shirtless, revealing several tattoos on his chest and upper arms. He is wearing knee-length shorts and a necklace, with no visible footwear. His skin is medium to dark in tone, and his hair is styled in a high, voluminous ponytail with shaved sides. The figure's musculature and anatomical features are well-defined, and his posture is relaxed but upright. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for warm weather.
description: A shirtless adult male with tattoos, wearing knee-length shorts and a necklace, standing upright with a high ponytail hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing tattoos on the chest, necklace, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the high ponytail, and the side of the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, the full length of the ponytail, and the back of the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the ponytail from the opposite side.
attribute_hairstyle: high voluminous ponytail with shaved sides
